creator: kwiat3k@panic.pl
text:
Seems that patch needs included in qemu-utils should be updated:

monster-1 qemu-utils # make install
===>  Patching for qemu-utils-4.1.1
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/emulators/qemu-utils/files/patch-configure
2 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to configure.rej
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/emulators/qemu-utils
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/emulators/qemu-utils
